hero.headline: Software for a Sustainable World
hero.subtext: Powering the world's largest AI-labeled plastic database and decarbonization infrastructure. We build the data operating system for the circular economy.

home.infraDesc: Processing billions of data points across global recycling and decarbonization networks. Our distributed platform powers real-time decision making at every node.

aiVision.title: The Global Plastic AI Library
aiVision.subtitle: The world's most comprehensive AI-powered material identification and classification system.
aiVision.apiDesc: Cloud-native infrastructure enabling real-time material classification at scale. RESTful APIs, WebSocket streams, and batch processing endpoints for enterprise integration.
aiVision.neuralDesc: Multi-modal deep learning models trained on spectroscopic, visual, and NIR data for unparalleled material identification precision.
aiVision.ctaDesc: Explore our carbon tracking platform or connect via API.

nexus.title: Nexus: The Operating System for Decarbonization
nexus.subtitle: End-to-end carbon tracking, from IoT sensor data to verified carbon credits.
nexus.iotDesc: Hardware sensors → Edge Computing → Nexus OS → Carbon Verification
nexus.edgeDesc: Distributed edge nodes process sensor data in real-time, reducing latency to sub-100ms for critical carbon accounting decisions.
nexus.pipelineDesc: End-to-end pipeline from raw sensor data to verified carbon credits, with blockchain notarization at every stage.
nexus.ctaDesc: Connect your facilities to the Nexus network and start generating verified carbon credits.

bio.title: Automated Bio-Computational Infrastructure
bio.subtitle: Transforming organic waste into high-value protein through AI-optimized Black Soldier Fly bioconversion.

supply.title: Supply Chain Sovereignty
supply.subtitle: Digital passports for recycled materials — full traceability from waste to product.
supply.passportDesc: Every recycled material unit receives a blockchain-verified digital passport tracking origin, processing, and certification.

metal.title: High-Value Material Sovereignty
metal.subtitle: Reclaiming strategic carbon fiber assets through proprietary pyrolysis technology and precision thermal processing
metal.overviewDesc: Our Carbon Fiber Recovery platform addresses a critical gap in the advanced materials supply chain. In partnership with Swancor and Tairylan, we've developed a proprietary pyrolysis process that recovers carbon fiber from end-of-life composite materials — including wind turbine blades, aerospace components, and automotive structures — while preserving up to 95% of the original fiber's mechanical properties. This technology transforms what was previously landfill-bound waste into high-value, market-ready reinforcement materials, establishing true material sovereignty in the circular economy.
metal.cap1Desc: Proprietary controlled-atmosphere pyrolysis achieving 95% mechanical property retention in recovered carbon fiber.
metal.cap2Desc: 500+ tonnes annually of composite waste from wind energy, aerospace, and automotive sectors.
metal.cap3Desc: AI-driven thermal profiling that dynamically adjusts process parameters based on real-time feedstock composition analysis.
metal.cap4Desc: Closed-loop energy recovery system capturing process gases for facility power generation, reducing carbon footprint by 60%.
metal.cap5Desc: Automated fiber length distribution analysis and tensile strength verification per batch.
metal.cap6Desc: Full documentation with Carbon-Link integration for ESG compliance and carbon credit verification.
metal.ctaDesc: Connect your composite waste streams to our precision recovery network.

partners.title: Partners & Research
partners.subtitle: Building the circular economy together. API access for enterprise and research partners.
partners.apiDesc: RESTful API access to our material classification engine, carbon tracking platform, and bioconversion analytics.
partners.name: Name
